reference: Hello Doctor, I am forty-two years old, and I had a bacterial infection. I took antibacterial and antifungal medication. Now, I have a burning sensation while urinating, and I feel like I have an unemptied bladder. I have an urge to urinate. I also have a feeling of leakage. I am taking the following medications for other conditions: Allopurinol, Aspirin, Ranitidine, Coversyl, and for hypothyroidism. Please suggest what I should do.
text: Doctor, I am 42 years old, and I had a bacterial infection. I took antibacterial and antifungal medication. Now, I have a burning sensation while urinating, and I feel like I have an unempty bladder. I have an urge to urinate. I also have a feeling of leakage. I am taking the following medications for other conditions. Allopurinol, aspirin, renididine, cover cell, and for hypothyroidism. Please suggest what I should do.
